implement.detail: register/enable/disable CLI (register idempotent, preserves enable choice); daemon hardened: /health HTTP, SIGTERM/SIGINT graceful shutdown that awaits + group-kills listeners, listener supervision (one detached-process-group worker per type:listener job, restart w/ tracked backoff timers, excluded from cron tick); apm.yml platforms claude-code->all + health_port; launchers/ for systemd/launchd/pm2/docker

test.detail: scheduler-cli (3): register-disabled+tick-skip, listener-not-cron-fired, enable+register-preserve. scheduler-daemon (3): cron fires with NO Claude in env + /health ok, SIGTERM graceful exit 0, listener restart-on-exit. Also fixed pre-existing memory-drift: improver-nightly now green, validation + claude-install -> basic-memory.
test.command: npx vitest run tests/scheduler-cli.test.ts tests/scheduler-daemon.test.ts tests/improver-nightly.test.ts

codexReview.detail: R1 needs-attention 3 findings ALL AGREED+FIXED: listener cron-double-fire (tick skips listeners), untracked restart-timer double-spawn race (listenerTimers + guards), shutdown orphan (await child exit, bounded, then SIGKILL). R2 raised process-tree orphan -> FIXED (detached process group + killListenerGroup negative-pid). No rebuttals.

codexPwTest.detail: daemon is headless; behavior covered by daemon integration tests

walkthrough.detail: no UI; daemon behavior is asserted by committed integration tests
